feed.title: Maine UCC (Uniform Commercial Code) Filing Division
feed.subtitle: Static informational/services page with no dated listing; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine UCC (Uniform Commercial Code) Filing Division
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + & will be closed Monday, September 7, 2026. Removed: - & will be closed Friday, July 3, 2026.
